contract: met-safely OR refused-honestly: every row delivered-mesh-clean (sliver=0, maxAspect3D<100, bnd=orient=0, nonMan=0 [Voronoi<=2 carve-out], featDrop=0) AND (delivered<=budget with not-needed/applied) OR (refused with delivered===built and a machine-readable reason). Decimation ladder: ErrorAbsolute, seed=profile sag (0.05mm high), x2 rungs to 0.2mm ceiling, plain-then-Regularize, per-candidate delta gates.
preRegisteredOutcome: FAILED-AS-DESIGNED ESCALATION: ArtDeco@499998 and DragonScales@499998 expected applied, measured refused (no-quality-safe-point). meshopt 1.0.1 reaches every budget within tiny absolute error (e.g. ArtDeco resultErr 0.0346mm < 0.05mm seed) but its greedy collapse manufactures slivers: ArtDeco plain +1076 slivers (maxAspect 1e9 degenerates), Regularize +147 (maxAspect 1.2e5); DragonScales plain +2683..+3424, Regularize +133..+235. The ladder is not the binding constraint - collapse ORDERING is. Named escalations (controller decision): simplifyWithAttributes vertex_lock on feature-line vertices; meshoptimizer 1.1.x (full re-baseline); accept refusal-dominant Draft tier.

noOpTripwire.productionDefault4M: BYTE-IDENTICAL 20/20 (HEAD pre-fix vs post-fix, PF_TARGET=4000000, dec=not-needed everywhere)
noOpTripwire.target400kVsCommittedBaseline: IDENTICAL 11/20 (all styles with natural<=400k); CHANGED 9/20 BY DESIGN - the committed mesh-hashes-default-2026-06.json rows for ArtDeco/Crystalline/BambooSegments/GeometricStar/BasketWeave/DragonScales/SpiralRidges/CelticTriquetra/Voronoi are the BROKEN decimator output (exactly 400000 tris, slivered); those rows now ship the cap-coarsened clean natural mesh.

fidelitySpotCheck.note: No applied row exists to spot-check; capSaturated case measured instead (mandatory in-gate).
fidelitySpotCheck.verdictStackedChordError: cap coarsening at saturation adds +0.043mm crest rms (0.092->0.135), bounded well under the reported effectiveMaxSagMm=0.2
